text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's a few days before the academy's tryouts, an event where students
can demonstrate their skills to trainers.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I head over to the track to see how the racers are doing today.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Well, I'm outta here. Catch ya guys later.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Wait, Vodka?! Where do you think you're going?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Ugh, she's such a wannabe delinquent!

text_block_list.name: Teacher A
text_block_list.text:
I'm concerned for her... I know she's got the talent, but tryouts are
coming up. Will she be okay?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Oh uh, you don't need to worry about her performance. She'll be just
fine.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Why don't we just go ahead and start practicing? The other students
are waiting for your directions.

text_block_list.name: Teacher A
text_block_list.text:
You're right. Well then, let's get started, shall we? We'll begin with a
2000-meter jog.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite the upcoming tryouts, Vodka seems to be boycotting
practice today.
choice_data_list: She doesn't strike me as lazy, though...
She doesn't strike me as lazy, though...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Curious, I follow her to figure out why.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Hmph. "Until you all find a trainer, you'll be following the instructors'
training regimen!"

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: As if I have time for that generic crap!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: I'm gonna do things my own way!
choice_data_list: Are you going to train by yourself?
Are you going to train by yourself?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Huh? Who are... Oh, you're one of the academy's trainers.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Yeah, got a problem? I'm a lone wolf, and that means I don't mingle.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Besides, the teacher's plans are waaaay too chill for me. My body'll
get weaker at that rate.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Anyway, we're done, right? I'm gonna go do my thing now.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Vodka bluntly ends the conversation and walks off. I hang around for
a bit more, observing her training.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Pheeeew! Now that's what I'm talkin' 'bout!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: But I'm just gettin' started!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even though she's overloading in certain aspects of her training and
neglecting others, she's still going strong in her own way.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Huh, still here? Damn, you must have nothin' better to do.
choice_data_list: So you really weren't trying to skip training.
So you really weren't trying to skip training.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: What? Me? Skip training? Do I look that lame?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Listen up, I'm gonna be the coolest racer in the Twinkle Series, the
kind who leaves everyone in the dust!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: If I do the same as everyone else, then I'll be the same as everyone else.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
It's just like gettin' buried in the middle of the pack. You get stuck in
there with no way out.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna train harder—so I can be faster than everyone else! I'm not
gonna get stuck behind anyone!
choice_data_list:
Is that why you made your own training
regimen?

Is that why you made your own training
regimen?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Yep. Got a problem?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although boycotting her teacher's regimen and creating her own
haphazard one isn't the best course of action, she's got guts.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: H-hey, whatcha doin' starin' at me like that?
choice_data_list: Oh, I was just thinking that you're pretty cool.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Coo—?!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: A-ahem! Sorry, can ya say that again? I couldn't hear ya!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Ya said somethin' 'bout me right? C'mon, say it one more time!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Hey, what's with that weak answer? Put some oomph into it!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: What did ya call me?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Hehehe! You've got a good eye for things!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna keep training... but you can stick around for as long as ya
want!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Because I'm so cool and generous!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: All right, I'm pumped! Let's up those reps!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: As I watch her train with even more gusto, I can't help but grin.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A few days later, tryouts officially begin and Vodka makes her
appearance.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Graaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Ngh!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Vodka is pushing ahead! Vodka is pushing ahead! Daiwa Scarlet is
fighting with all her might...

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
But the gap is too big! Vodka finishes in first, Daiwa Scarlet in
second!

text_block_list.name: Veteran Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
Your running's a bit rough around the edges, but you've got great
potential, Vodka! Why don't you come and join me?

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
No, come join me instead! I've amassed plenty of data on the racers
I've trained in the past. I'll be able to design a training program
specifically for—

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Sorry, but I'm not interested that kinda thing.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Vodka's performance pulls in many scouting offers, but none seem to
land.
choice_data_list: (If I recall, what she really wants to hear is...)

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it's you from the other day! Hehe, whatd'ya think about my
racing?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: For real?! Yes!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Hey hey, you're not training anyone yet, right? How 'bout joining
forces with me?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Hell yeah! Looking forward to workin' with ya, Trainer!
